name: Yang Jian

skills.name: Mind Games
skills.description: Yang Jian's Basic Attack and skills can stack Resistance. After attaining max stacks, he gains crowd control immunity. If Yang Jian enters battle with a hero, he will enter the Heaven-Earth Form.

skills.name: Unleash the Hound
skills.description: Commands Heaven Hound to pounce in the target direction, marking the first enemy hit and damaging them. Upon using the skill again, he charges to the target and deals damage.

skills.name: Vain Disillusionment
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in front, stunning and slowing them. If he hits an enemy, he gains an enhanced Basic Attack that deals extra damage.

skills.name: Sight of Origin
skills.description: Unleashes beams of light that deal damage and restore his Health.

skillsZh.name: 神智侵蝕
skillsZh.description: 楊戩的普攻和技能可以疊加韌性，疊加到上限後獲得霸體，若與英雄進入戰鬥則變為法天象地狀態。

skillsZh.name: 逆轉乾坤
skillsZh.description: 楊戩命令嘯天犬衝鋒，對命中的敵人造成傷害並標記，再次施放楊戩將衝向目標造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 虛妄破滅
skillsZh.description: 楊戩暈眩前方敵人，造成傷害和減速，命中後強化普攻，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 根源之目
skillsZh.description: 楊戩施放雷射，造成傷害並回復生命值。

tips: Yang Jian (Warrior): Tier B — 51.15% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace.
tipsZh: 楊戩（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 51.15%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、暗影戰斧、冰痕之握.

patchHistory.change: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.
patchHistory.detail: We've added a brand-new ability, the Heaven-Earth Form, enhancing Yang Jian's unique Resistance mechanic and visual appearance. We've also significantly optimized the hit mechanic for Heaven Hound, and added a new Heavenly Eye attack in the normal state, granting both recovery and true damage.

patchHistory.change: Reduced cooldown for Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased Ultimate's healing.
patchHistory.detail: Yang Jian often needs to dash into the enemy crowd. We've increased his Ultimate's recovery amount and frequency to help him sustain longer in combat.

patchHistory.change: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
patchHistory.detail:
We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
Yang Jian is the perfect definition of what it means to be comprehensive. By adjusting his Ultimate's recovery effect and bonus, we have tried to make Yang Jian more consistent with his position as a fighter on the battlefield.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整技能效果和冷卻時間
楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。
patchHistoryZh.detail: 楊戩新增法天象地的全新能力，強化楊戩獨有的韌性機制與視覺感受。嘯天犬的命中機制也進行了大幅調整，楊戩更新增普通狀態下的天眼攻擊，使他能獲得回復並造成真傷。

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能和3技能冷卻，增加3技能回血
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「楊戩的技能需要經常突進到敵群之中，我們提升他的大招回復量和頻率以便持續作戰。」

patchHistoryZh.change: We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
patchHistoryZh.detail:
We've increased the base Health recovery provided by Yang Jian's Ultimate, and changed its equipment bonus type.
Yang Jian is the perfect definition of what it means to be comprehensive. By adjusting his Ultimate's recovery effect and bonus, we have tried to make Yang Jian more consistent with his position as a fighter on the battlefield.

faqs.question: Is Yang Jian good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is Tier B Warrior with 51.15% win rate, 0.35% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Yang Jian build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Pure Sky, Overlord's Might, Eye of the Phoenix.

faqs.question: How to counter Yang Jian?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian.

faqsZh.question: 楊戩 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 楊戩 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.15%、選取 0.35%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 楊戩 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、暗影戰斧、冰痕之握、純淨蒼穹、強者破軍、不死鳥之眼.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 楊戩？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。楊戩 克制 Diaochan、Luna、Dr Bian。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Diaochan、Luna、Dr Bian；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Yang Jian is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yang Jian: Yang Jian's Resistance increases for each nearby enemy hero.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Yang Jian's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Unleash the Hound → Vain Disillusionment → Sight of Origin → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Sight of Origin (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Unleash the Hound, and Sight of Origin on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Unleash the Hound → Vain Disillusionment → Sight of Origin → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Yang Jian sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yang Jian vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Yang Jian when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Yang Jian vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Yang Jian has +0.5% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Yang Jian when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Yang Jian excels into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.
